title: Jojo's mini adventures
description: Jojo's mini adventures - Modpack in which the main goal is to master the stand
body:
A compact JoJo-themed adventure where stands clash and meteors fall.
You awaken in a cold world, haunted by mysterious powers.
Your journey begins with one goal — to find a Stand Arrow. Will you search deep within icy biomes for fallen meteorites, or brave dangerous dungeons in hopes of discovery?

But you're not the only one with power — hostile mobs have evolved, and some of them now possess stands of their own. You'll need strategy, strength, and a stand of your own to survive.

This lightweight modpack includes just 29 carefully selected mods, ensuring smooth performance even on low-end PCs, while still delivering a thrilling, JoJo-inspired experience.
________________________________________________________________________________________________

Features

🗻 Stand Power – Use the JoJo: Ripples of the Past mod to unlock your stand and harness unique abilities

🌨️ Meteorites – Hunt meteorites in winter biomes to craft your own Stand Arrow

⚔️ Stronger Mobs – Enemies now possess increased strength… and sometimes, a stand

🏰 Exploration – Discover hidden dungeons and secrets across a dangerous world

🧩 Lightweight – Only 29 mods for optimal performance and quick load times

🎮 Balanced Gameplay – Designed for short but memorable sessions

Will you become a Stand User worthy of legend?
Your story begins now.
